title: Local AI needs to be the norm
summary: 该帖子主张本地AI应成为常态，强调数据隐私和自主控制的重要性，避免依赖云端服务。

title: Gemini API File Search is now multimodal
summary: Gemini API 文件搜索功能升级为多模态，支持结合文本和图像进行更智能的检索。

title: Show HN: Rust but Lisp
summary: 这是一个展示将Rust语言与Lisp语法结合的实验性项目，旨在探索Rust的灵活性和Lisp的表达能力。

title: Show HN: Building a web server in assembly to give my life (a lack of) meaning
text:
This is ymawky, a static file web server for MacOS written entirely in ARM64 assembly. It supports GET, PUT, DELETE, HEAD, and OPTIONS requests, and supports Range: bytes=X-Y headers (which allows scrubbing for video streaming). It decodes percent-encoded URLs, strictly enforces docroot, serves custom error pages for any HTTP error response, supports directory listing, and has (some) mitigations against slowloris-like attacks.

I’ve also written a more detailed writeup here: https://imtomt.github.io/ymawky/
summary: 一位开发者用ARM64汇编语言编写了名为ymawky的MacOS静态文件服务器，支持多种HTTP请求和视频流功能，具备安全防护措施和详细技术文档。

title: LLMorphism: When humans come to see themselves as language models
summary: 这篇论文探讨人类如何逐渐将自己视为语言模型，分析人与AI在认知和行为上的相似性与影响。

title: Surfel-based global illumination on the web
summary: 这篇帖子介绍了在网页端实现基于Surfel（表面元素）的全局光照技术，展示了其高效渲染和逼真光影效果的应用突破。
